narrative:
Mary Ann Township (precinct in Licking County) has 1,408 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.6 percentage points.
